Wave10.name: Integration Wiring — 接线工程
Wave10.description: 将 Wave 7-9 已实现模块接入运行时: E-Stop/Canary/TextRecovery/SelfRepair in harness, Reranker in HybridQuery, PromptParts dynamic_context, RetryPolicy in pipeline, KG tools registration, RateLimiter, OAuth PKCE fix, pricing 9→34, providers 15→25

notes: Wave 10 COMPLETE (37/37 tasks). All 23 competitive gaps now operationally active via integration wiring. 1774 tests passing (+13 from W10). Key wiring: harness gets E-Stop/Canary/TextRecovery/SelfRepair, HybridQuery gets Reranker, pipeline gets structured RetryPolicy, runtime registers KG tools, OAuth PKCE fixed to base64url.
